case_title: 657 MISSION STREET BUILDING PARTNERSHIP C/O ROBERT VS SAN FRANCISCO WATER DEPT.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO WATER DEPT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 657 MISSION STREET BUILDING PARTNERSHIP C/O ROBERT IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO WATER DEPT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,050.00 FILED BY 657 MISSION STREET BUILDING PARTNERSHIP C/O ROBERT AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO WATER DEPT. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-07-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
LETTER FROM PLAINTIFF REGARDING JUDGMENT, CASE UNDER SUBMISSION OVER 90 DAYS.
